payload.answer: Do not store the proposed memory.
citations: For context, LLM proposal: one conversation_summary card containing an entire 8000 word transcript.
payload.reason: An entire 8000-word transcript bundled as a conversation_summary is not an appropriate durable memory. It is bulk conversational content rather than a concise, stable fact or preference suitable for long-term storage.
